title: To amend the Agriculture Improvement Act of 2018 to reauthorize the dairy business innovation initiatives.
plain_summary: This bill makes changes to a government program that helps dairy businesses. The program gives money and support to companies that make milk, cheese, and other dairy products from cows, sheep, and goats. The bill increases the funding for this program from twenty million dollars to thirty six million dollars each year. It also requires that there must be at least four different regional programs instead of three, so more areas of the country can get help.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Livestock, Dairy, and Poultry.

sections.title: Section 1. Dairy Business Innovation Initiatives
sections.text: This section makes changes to Section 12513 of the Agriculture Improvement Act of 2018. The changes do three things. First, it changes the number three to four in subsection b. Second, it changes the number three to four in subsection g, part 1, subpart A. Third, it changes the dollar amount from twenty million dollars to thirty six million dollars in subsection i.
